scripts.dev: npm run generate-examples && npm run build:deps && vite
scripts.build:deps: for dir in '../../web_core' '../../markdown/markdown-it' '../../lit'; do npm install --prefix $dir && npm run build --prefix $dir; done && npm install
scripts.build: npm run generate-examples && npm run build:deps && tsc && vite build
scripts.test: npm run generate-examples && karma start karma.conf.cjs --single-run=false --auto-watch=true
scripts.test:debug: npm run generate-examples && karma start karma.conf.cjs --single-run=false --auto-watch=true --browsers Chrome
scripts.test:ci: npm run build:deps && npm run generate-examples && karma start karma.conf.cjs --single-run=true
